team_name: Sales, GTM & Marketing Super Intelligence Team
build_method: local-first (LM Studio + retriever + validator); Claude top-up on thin signals
notes: Go-to-market: category design, demand gen, sales methodology, PLG, brand, pricing, customer success. Loud public voices (books, podcasts, frameworks). Boundary: product strategy/discovery => Product&Design; growth-as-product-analytics overlaps Data. geoffrey-moore cross-listed from Strategy (built earlier in the same queue).

cells.category-design-positioning: Category creation, positioning, market framing, crossing the chasm.
cells.demand-gen-content-marketing: Demand generation, content, SEO, audience building, inbound.
cells.brand-strategy: Brand building, distinctiveness, marketing effectiveness science.
cells.customer-success-retention: Post-sale expansion, retention, net revenue retention, CS as a discipline.
